notes: Focused subset converted from the official OCL Swagger 2.0 document (v2.3.201). Models the org-owned resources the adaptor reaches: organizations, sources, collections, concepts, source and collection-versioned mappings, and users. getMappings maps to /orgs/{org}/collections/{collection}/{version}/mappings/. List endpoints are modeled as bare JSON arrays (OCL returns pagination in response headers, e.g. num_found/pages); detail endpoints return a single object. OCL now requires auth for data endpoints, so live envelope behavior was not re-verified.
